creator: m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
text:
Currently www/redmine port is broken permanently because of dependencies mess: recent versions require a newer rails when we have in the ports tree, oldest - does not work with our rubygems 1.8.
I managed to create a custom bunlde which makes it possible to meet all required dependencies in a cost of somewhat increased tarball size.\

Patch is available from http://tsatsenko.ru/files/redmine-2.0.0.patch
